title: United announce Tielemans signing
summary: Manchester United is pleased to confirm that Youri Tielemans has joined the club, subject to registration.

title: Man United announce signing of midfielder Andrey Santos from Chelsea
summary: Manchester United is pleased to confirm that Andrey Santos has joined the club, subject to registration. The Brazil international has signed a contract until June 2031, with the option to extend for a further year.

title: Transfers: United sign Tielemans, Trossard exits Arsenal
summary: Brighton have signed defender Luka Vuskovic from Tottenham Hotspur for an initial 46 million pounds. The 19-year-old Croatia international has agreed a five-year contract with the Seagulls. Manchester United have confirmed the signing of Belgium midfielder Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa on a five-year contract for a fee understood to be 35 million pounds. Tielemans is United's third summer signing after Andrey Santos and goalkeeper Karl Darlow from Leeds.

title: Summer transfer window 2026: Premier League deals, ins and outs
summary: Aston Villa in: Johan Manzambi from Freiburg, 59.5m. Joao Gomes from Wolves, 38m. Aston Villa out: Morgan Rogers to Chelsea, 117m. Youri Tielemans to Man Utd, 36m. Arsenal out: Leandro Trossard to Besiktas, 17m.

title: Transfers, rumours and market values
summary: Johan Manzambi joins Aston Villa, SC Freiburg receive record transfer fee. Manchester United sign Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa. Leandro Trossard joins Besiktas for 20m euro package as Arsenal turn attention to Rogers. Luka Vuskovic joins Brighton from Tottenham in club record deal.
